title: The Man Sitting On More UFO Evidence Than Anyone Alive
summary: Jesse Michels interviews Clauss von Spawn, a Swedish journalist and UFO researcher who has spent over 50 years building the world's largest UFO archive, the Archives of the Unexplained. The interview covers Scandinavian UFO cases, the 1946 ghost rocket phenomenon, potential crash retrievals in Swedish lakes, and the Betty Hill case, while exploring the complex and often absurd nature of UFO encounters.

acronyms.definition: The world's largest UFO archive, a 16-room building in Sweden housing UFO case files, documents, photographs, and research materials
The oldest UFO group in the world, which had early knowledge of UFO cases in the 1940s
Pentagon UFO investigation program referenced as OAP in the transcript, operated from 2007-2012

events.description: Swedish ghost rocket craze - at least 1,400 documented rocket and cigar-shaped UFOs descended on Norway and Sweden, prompting Swedish government to form a specialized military unit and search lakes for crashed objects
Two carpenters on the Swedish island of V encountered a UFO that caused their car to die, leaving behind a hot tungsten artifact
Betty and Barney Hill abduction case in New Hampshire - canonical UFO abduction case
Clauss von Spawn started compiling the UFO archives that would become AFU
UFO landing and sinking at Lake Damaya in northern Sweden, witnessed by two people in daylight, with radar returns showing an object in the mud
Hannah McRoberts photographed a UFO over Vancouver Island on October 8th
Leslie Kean's article outed the Pentagon's UFO investigation program

key_claims.claim: The Archives for the Unexplained contains 22,000 case files from Sweden alone
10% of 1,600 Swedes surveyed had seen something unexplained
Betty Hill witnessed a UFO crash and recovered debris years before her famous 1961 abduction, burying the debris in her backyard where it may still be
In Hessdalen, Norway, 80-90% of residents have experienced UFO-related phenomena
Swedish military searched multiple lakes in 1946 for ghost rocket debris but only found indentations at the bottom, never any physical debris
Radar returns indicate an object is resting in 4 meters of mud at Lake Damaya from a 1980 UFO landing
CD Jackson, who ran psychological warfare operations and was involved in MK Ultra, visited Betty and Barney Hill weeks after their abduction
The Ubatuba Brazil magnesium sample has anomalous isotope ratios that would have required a centrifuge to produce
